{{Quote|I've decided to go into business for myself, boss. These Rebels should be worth a bundle|Vassk|<ref name="ITAN" />}}
'''Vassk''' was a sinister-looking [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] working for [[Tal Pak]]. He accompanied Pak to the [[Red Moon Saloon]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to rendezvous with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents. Prior to that Vassk had tipped off the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for a substantial reward, thus betraying Pak.
